EmailSubject: Welcome to NovaSupport - Verify Your Email
EmailMessage:
Hi there!

Welcome to NovaSupport! We're excited to have you.

Enter this code in the app to verify your email and start submitting support tickets.

This code expires in 24 hours. If you didn't create this account, you can safely ignore this email.
